scripts.frontend: cd frontend && (npm run dev || bun run dev)
scripts.backend: cd backend && (npm start || bun run start)
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && (npm run dev || bun run dev)
scripts.admin: cd admin-panel && (npm run dev || bun run dev)
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspaces --parallel || (npx concurrently "npm run frontend" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run admin" || bun run --filter "*" dev)
